seoTitle: Skeleton Rock vs Solus — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Skeleton Rock and Solus. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Skeleton Rock vs Solus: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Skeleton Rock and Solus.
heading: Skeleton Rock vs Solus — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Skeleton Rock, Western Australia and Solus, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Skeleton Rock has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Solus (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Skeleton Rock or Solus safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Skeleton Rock has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Solus scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Skeleton Rock scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Solus scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Skeleton Rock or Solus?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Skeleton Rock has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
